Class TransferApplicationServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.application.impl.TransferApplicationServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
TransferApplicationService
public class TransferApplicationServiceImpl extends Object implements TransferApplicationService
Default implementation of TransferApplicationService that orchestrates inter-shelter transfer requests across the service layer. Validates animal availability and shelter membership before creating a request, and dispatches notifications and audit entries for every operation.

  • Constructor Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • TransferApplicationServiceImpl

      public TransferApplicationServiceImpl(TransferService transferService, AnimalService animalService, ShelterService shelterService, RequestNotificationService notificationService, AuditService<TransferRequest> auditService)
      Constructs a TransferApplicationServiceImpl with all required service dependencies. All five services are mandatory; none may be null.
      Parameters:
      transferService - the service managing transfer request state; must not be null
      animalService - the service for animal lookups; must not be null
      shelterService - the service for shelter lookups; must not be null
      notificationService - the service for dispatching status-change notifications; must not be null
      auditService - the service for recording audit log entries; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is null

  • Method Details

    • requestTransfer

      public TransferRequest requestTransfer(String animalId, String fromShelterId, String toShelterId)
      Initiates a transfer request to move an available animal from one shelter to another. Throws an exception if the animal is not found in the source shelter, is not available, or if the destination shelter is at capacity. Verifies the animal is in the source shelter and is available before creating the request.
      Specified by:
      requestTransfer in interface TransferApplicationService
      Parameters:
      animalId - the ID of the animal to transfer; must not be null or blank
      fromShelterId - the ID of the source shelter; must not be null or blank
      toShelterId - the ID of the destination shelter; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      the newly created TransferRequest

    • approveTransfer

      public void approveTransfer(String requestId)
      Approves a pending transfer request and moves the animal to the destination shelter. Throws an exception if the request is not found or is not in a pending state.
      Specified by:
      approveTransfer in interface TransferApplicationService
      Parameters:
      requestId - the ID of the transfer request to approve; must not be null or blank

    • rejectTransfer

      public void rejectTransfer(String requestId)
      Rejects a pending transfer request, leaving the animal in the source shelter. Throws an exception if the request is not found or is not in a pending state.
      Specified by:
      rejectTransfer in interface TransferApplicationService
      Parameters:
      requestId - the ID of the transfer request to reject; must not be null or blank

    • cancelTransfer

      public void cancelTransfer(String requestId)
      Cancels a pending transfer request that has not yet been reviewed. Throws an exception if the request is not found or is not in a pending state.
      Specified by:
      cancelTransfer in interface TransferApplicationService
      Parameters:
      requestId - the ID of the transfer request to cancel; must not be null or blank

    • listAllTransfers

      public List<TransferRequest> listAllTransfers()
      Returns every transfer request currently in the system. Returns an empty list if no transfers have been requested. Used by the shelter print command to render a system-wide snapshot. Delegates to the underlying TransferService.
      Specified by:
      listAllTransfers in interface TransferApplicationService
      Returns:
      a list of all transfer requests
